The '''Imperial Moff's Estate''' was the official residence of the [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was previously the estate of the Imperial [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented the Tapani Sector.

The large building was located on [[Estalle Island]] and used was for both entertainment and official [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] business. It was the official residence of the Tapani sector Moff during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]] and was previously the estate of Tapani's Imperial senator, prior to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] invasion of the [[Freeworlds Territory]], the said Imperial Moff was [[Laird Gustavu]].

The estate was located in the residential district of Estalle Island on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]]. It was a large building that was used for both entertainment and official business.
